_publications._publicationTitle: Therapeutic Vulnerability to ATR Inhibition in Concurrent

_contextSnippet: The glioma cell line U251, which develops ALT after ATRX KO, was more sensitive to two different ATR inhibitors (AZD6738 and VE-822) in the absence of ATRX
details: More sensitive to ATR inhibitors (AZD6738 and VE-822) in the absence of ATRX
